login.difficult: Having trouble logging in? Click 'Learn more' for assistance and guidance.
login.make_login: Log in quickly and securely with your Facebook, GitHub, or Google credentials to start exploring all the possibilities that Save offers.

access.request_text: You currently do not have access to SAVE. Fill in your details to get access.

dashboard.delete_error: An error occurred while deleting the survey.
dashboard.title: Welcome to SAVE!
dashboard.subtitle: Explore, manage, and track the progress of your open surveys and see those already completed. In addition, create new surveys, all in one place.

header.title: manage participants
header.description: Here, you can organize effectively to ensure your survey reaches the right people.

header.title: Manage participants
header.description: Create custom groups based on specific criteria, such as interests, demographics, or any other relevant factor.

section.title: Start Here: Fill in your group's initial details.

second_section.title: Add participants to your group by importing from CSV or via email.
second_section.name: Name

modal.description: Each line of the CSV file must contain the information of a single participant, the first column being their full name followed by a semicolon (;) and the second column their email address. Access the example
modal.add_file: Click to insert file (X MB max)

second_modal.title: Instructions for CSV format
second_modal.description: The CSV format for graduate prototypes must follow the structure below:
second_modal.description_1: -In the first column, enter the graduate's full name, followed by a semicolon (;).
second_modal.description_2: -In the second column, enter the graduate's email address.

create.title: Profile of Graduates of Computing Courses at Unipampa

description.placeholder: This questionnaire aims to collect information about the profile of...

config.title: Configuration
config.name_about: Name is an attribute responsible for giving an identity to the question. Through it we can create and manage its interactions, with other questions, and graphs.

user.title: Profile of Graduates from Unipampa's Computing Courses
user.description: Stay informed about the progress of active surveys by viewing participants and the number of completions.

complete.title: New Survey
complete.description: Customize your survey by defining title, description and dates.
complete.date1: The opening date cannot be earlier than the current date.
complete.date2: The closing date cannot be earlier than the opening date.
complete.date3: The closing date must be greater than or equal to the opening date.

data_catalogue.informations: Discover a wealth of information about graduates' academic journeys and use these insights to strengthen the educational excellence of university courses
data_catalogue.click_reports: Click 'View' to view informative graphical data.

dashboard.welcome_user:
Welcome to the Save platform! 
 Share your knowledge and experience by answering the surveys available to you.

about.title: Facilitate Academic Data Management
about.description: Collecting, analyzing and presenting graduate data has never been so simple. Find out how to simplify and streamline this task now
about.connecting_text: Enrich the academic experience and promote educational growth
about.university_text: Opportunity to share your academic and professional experiences through questionnaires
about.educational_results: Managers of educational institutions can use the results and insights obtained by SAVE to make decisions related to improving courses.
about.clicking_view: By clicking on the View button, you will be taken to the graphs generated by the questionnaires.
about.academic_future: Connect with the academic future, share insights and contribute to course improvement.
about.authentication: We make it easy to access Save with authentication via Google, Facebook or GitHub. Choose your preferred platform and join our community. Let’s build a better educational future together!

public_data.title: Making Information Available to the Public
public_data.customize: Customize the visualization of data that will be accessible to the general public.
public_data.share: Ready to share? Select the charts that will be displayed publicly.

policy.title: Terms of Policy and Privacy
policy.welcome: Welcome to the Graduate Tracking System - SAVE, aimed at collecting data and providing statistics about the graduates' trajectories, as well as offering a tool to evaluate academic courses through questionnaires with their alumni, enabling the investigation of possible improvements.
policy.commitment: Our commitment is to protect your privacy and ensure that your personal information is handled securely and responsibly. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and share users' personal information in our system.
policy.collect: We will collect the following personal information to achieve our objectives and provide the best experience for our users:
policy.name: - Full Name
policy.data: This data will be provided directly by you when registering in our system. Additionally, we will collect information provided through the voluntary completion of the follow-up questionnaires you will be invited to answer.
policy.2: 2) Data Provided by the Educational Institution
policy.database: Our database is initially populated with data provided by Higher Education Institutions, allowing the validation of user registration to verify their prior connection with the institution.
policy.cookies: Our system uses cookies to enhance the user experience. Cookies are small text files stored in your browser that allow us to personalize your experience in the system and provide information about how it is used. The types of cookies we use include:
policy.cookies1: - Essential Cookies: Necessary for the system's functionality.
policy.personal_data: The personal data collected is used for:
policy.share: We do not share your personal information with third parties, except when necessary to comply with legal or regulatory obligations or in response to requests from public authorities. Some non-sensitive data collected through the questionnaires may be shared for research and analysis purposes.
policy.security: We have implemented cryptographic security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, complete security of information transmitted via the internet cannot be guaranteed, and users should be aware of the inherent risks.
policy.stored_data: Your personal data will be stored indefinitely, but it is possible to modify or delete it upon explicit request.
policy.lgpd: Under the LGPD (General Data Protection Law), you have several rights regarding your personal data, such as:
policy.correct: - Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data;
policy.delete: - Deletion of personal data under certain conditions;
policy.revogate: - Withdrawal of consent for data usage, where applicable.
policy.rights: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us through the channels available in the system.
policy.update: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Changes will be published on this page, and the update date will be revised at the top of this document.
policy.contact: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, please contact us via email at 'alinemello@unipampa.edu.br'.
